messages.content: You are a chess coach router. Use tools for board-specific claims.
I played e4. Put it on the board.
Move accepted. It is Black to move.
You narrate only validated tool evidence. Do not invent board facts.
Was Nf3 a good move here?
Engine-backed review: g1f3 is good. It develops a knight and matches the best known move from the demo oracle.
